design_philosophy: A cyber-financial intelligence fusion center must prioritize data density and uncompromising clarity. We reject soft SaaS aesthetics in favor of 'Technical Brutalism'. The UI acts as a literal grid—a structural blueprint of truth—using stark contrasts to highlight anomalies in money laundering and terrorism financing.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Strict border-collapse style layout. Widgets have no gaps (gap-0) but are separated by hard 1px borders to maximize screen real estate and create a 'terminal' feel.
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: rounded-none. Absolutely zero border radius. Sharp, 90-degree corners enforce rigidity and precision.
layout_and_spacing.container_padding: Internal widget padding must be generous (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision, despite tight external grid packing.
layout_and_spacing.optical_alignment: Left-align all data blocks. Center alignment is banned unless used for isolated hero text.

surface_strategies.widgets_and_cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use pure HTML + Tailwind pure CSS grid. Flat white backgrounds, 1px solid border (#E5E5E5 or #0A0A0A for focus). No shadows.
surface_strategies.header_nav: Solid Stark White (#FFFFFF) with a hard 1px black bottom border. Functional left sidebar or top nav, avoiding hamburger menus on desktop.
surface_strategies.modals_dialogs: Flat white background, harsh 2px black border, solid black shadow offset (e.g., 4px 4px 0px #0A0A0A) for a neo-brutalist pop.
surface_strategies.glassmorphism: Strictly BANNED for this health/finance-adjacent intelligence app. Solid colors only to prevent data refraction.

components.buttons: Flat, sharp edges. Primary uses International Klein Blue (bg-[#002FA7] text-white). Hover state: invert to white background with blue text and blue border.
components.inputs: Shadcn defaults completely stripped of rounded corners (rounded-none). 1px border-gray-300. Focus state MUST have a hard 2px black ring.
components.tables: High density. Use JetBrains Mono for ALL numeric columns, IDs, and crypto wallet hashes. 1px black bottom borders for rows. No striped backgrounds.
components.charts_visualizations: Use Recharts with sharp line configurations (type='linear', not 'monotone'). Entity Relationship Graphs (GNN) should use D3 or React Force Graph with stark angular connections.
components.badges: Square badges (rounded-none). High contrast. e.g., Critical uses red background with stark white text.

motion_and_interactions.philosophy: Instantaneous. Animation should be minimal to reflect a high-performance terminal.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp background color changes (transition-none or extremely fast duration-75).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Always explicitly set text color on hover. Ensure focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black) are prominent for keyboard navigation.

image_urls.description: Black and white abstract geometric lines acting as a structural, intelligence-agency background.
Abstract vintage map texture, used as a subtle overlay for geographic entity tracking.

technical_instructions_to_main_agent: Install custom fonts via Google Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (if available via fontshare, otherwise Chivo), IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react` for the icon system.
Strip ALL rounded corners from Shadcn components by setting `--radius: 0rem;` in `index.css`.
Construct the main dashboard layout using CSS Grid with a 1px gap colored via a background to simulate a continuous grid line (e.g., `className='grid gap-px bg-border'`).
Assign `data-testid` attributes to all actionable elements (e.g., `data-testid='export-ltkm-btn'`, `data-testid='risk-score-widget'`).
Do NOT use drop-shadows on dashboard cards. Rely strictly on typography scale and 1px borders to establish hierarchy.
